content: Heads up note from @Aakash 2025-04-04T19:22:00.000+05:30: Sharing a brief note for our $50K investment in [Revspot’s](https://www.revspot.ai/) pre-seed round, amounting to 0.75% ownership. This is round where paperwork is closing now, we had committed in Sept 2024. The co has since scaled to $300K ARR, even hitting $80K ACVs with Indian customers. This is a community cheque underwriting with RK, Chirag, Aakrit and Miten The co is raising $1.4 Mn at $6.6 M post money. Round is being co-led by Titan and Infoedge ventures This was brought to us by RK and product was strongly vouched for with a strong reference on Darshan. We are restricting this to a community cheque even with multiple folks from the collective giving a strong signal, given lack of FMF on SaaS GTM and very India first build out **About Co** - Revspot is building AI powered pre-sales agents and marketing intelligence tools for the non-SaaS world where MQL generation is key to growth (vis Financial services, Real Estate, O2O platforms) - They have early traction with Livspace, Dezerv, Meragi, Stabl Money and multiple other cos and are adding logos at a fast clip **Founding Team** 1. [Darshan Subhash](https://www.linkedin.com/in/darshansubash/?originalSubdomain=in) - Was leading customer success in 6Sense in his most recent stint. Got there via slintel acquisition (where he was the chief of stagff) - Was earlier leading sales strategy at Livspace and had a short stint at Unacademy - IIM Indore 2014 1. [Varun Garg](...

Heads Up Note 2025-11-25T09:18:00.000+05:30: Hi team, Sharing the heads-up note for our investment in WorkAtoms which is a text to workflow builder for non-engineering knowledge work (e.g. content writing, social media monitoring, responding to inbound requests etc) - initial focus is on Marketing & GTM teams DeVC is investing $50K as part of a $2M SAFE round @ $10M post money valuation *Note: This is a founder-first investment (based on IIT-B signals) + Community Top Up to *[*Nikhil*](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nikhil-abraham)* from Cloud Chef (new DeVC Collective member in US). Hence, we have sized the cheque accordingly & will do more work in coming months as they tighten their GTM and sharpen their product (hopefully for a single vertical) * **Founders** 1. [Dhruv Jaglan](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dhruv-jaglan/) - CEO & Founder 1. IIT Bombay CS 2020 1. 2.5 YOE @ BabbleBots AI - was promoted from Founding Engineer to Co-Founder 1. 1.5 YOE @ LinkedIn India 1. From Cash:* ++ soft refs from IIT-B network on Dhruv : “Rockstar and would get anything done”, “Machau ladka hai.. keeps picking new things and building”* 1. [Georgi Boby](https://www.linkedin.com/in/georgi-boby-07b081161/) - COO & Co-Founder 1. 6.5 YOR @ Cloudchef as Founding Engineer 1. IIT Bombay 2019 1. From Cash: *++ Table thumping ref on Georgi from Nikhil @ Cloud Chef and Ashray @ Rephrase AI* **Investing Process** 1. We were introduced to Dhruv Jaglan (main founder) via Activate AI (Aakrit & Pratyush) 1. Act...

De-brief (if any):

Notes:: 1. **Ankit & other CoFo Jayant** 1. Pissed off that students couldn’t take CS programs unless they did pre-reqs 1. Made a simple web tool to map out pre-reqs & simulate the pathways in future semester 1. 1 year together selling software to corporate training academies 1. Both were Tech CoFos hence no Sales muscle 1. **Abhishek** 1. Feb 2024 → Jayant and Abhishek wanted to do something together 1. Put everything on the line to built a business 1. Ankit has student loan 1. Jayant has left PPO 1. Tried to sell personal transcribing tool to founders 1. His dad has taken an unsecured biz loan at 48% p.a. 1. **Problem → multi lingual conversations in Indian call center** 1. Spammed everyone on LinkedIn 1. Jazib Ali from Slice → collections team is 300 versus CX team is 30 1. Sometimes caller goes beyond boundaries to demand collections 1. Went to Poonawala Fincorp NBFC call center in Pune — “couldn’t imagine place in the world where 300 people are shouting” 1. Understood that QC executive (20 of them) will fill in forms 1. “Wanted to move from cost center to revenue generation” — started as QC tool but realized collections is better 1. **Learnings** 1. Being first to collections is critical 1. “Promise To Pay” disposition doesn’t capture the full context of the call 1. Collections call analysis is the wedge 1. Now migrated to making the collections call 1. **GTM** 1. Spammed on LinkedIn — tried different copy 1. Nira Money — cold email 1. Jupiter, Groww — cold email as well...

AI notes: ### Business Background & Team ### Product Vision ### Target Market ### Strategic Considerations ### Current Status ### Action Items
RM reflections: ++ Love the fact that they want to bootstrap to MVP, test w/ customers and ONLY then consider raising a round ++ Clear Why Now for this AI credit companion type business; we have a thesis ++ in-domain with 10K+ hours, esp for Som who has done 8 YOE @ KreditBee ++ Som’s wife used to lead Perf Marketing @ KreditBee so she will help them with UA ?? I don’t see a clear spike in either of them ?? Couldn’t see Consumer Tech chops ?? Som does NOT have a breakout trajectory; he is 8 YOE @ KreditBee even after IIM Cal; only AVP level ?? Don’t see either founder as a good seller Key Qs for me - What are the refs on Som (given he doesn’t have family who worked at KreditBee; Shobhit’s elder brother roped him into KreditBee) - What is the quality of this team v/s Oolka & GoCredit? should get MPE when they are ready
